a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Estimated cumulative excess deaths, from The Economist and the WHO,
Cumulative difference between the number of reported or estimated deaths in 2020–2021 and the projected number of deaths for
the same period based on previous years. Estimates differ because the models differ in the data and methods used.
Data source: World Health Organization (2023); The Economist (2024); World Health Organization (2024)
